heading: Omitted
label: 616ss to 616vv–5 Omitted
notes: CodificationSection 616ss, , , , authorized construction, operation, and maintenance of Whitestone Coulee unit of Okanogan-Similkameen division of Chief Joseph Dam project, Washington.Pub. L. 88–599, § 178 Stat. 955Sept. 18, 1964Section 616tt, , , , provided that section 2 of the act (, 569) apply to this unit.Pub.
